title: Caption Plan
description: Decision log for caption acquisition path. Produced by Phase 3 caption discovery.

source.description: 'official' = use yt-dlp captions; 'asr' = use WhisperX transcription

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the path decision

input_srt.description: Path to the raw SRT file downloaded from official captions. Null when source=asr.

languages_checked.description: Caption language codes that were checked
